nasb.text: Yet you say, ‘The way of the Lord is not right.’ O house of Israel, I will judge each of you according to his ways.”

esv.text: Yet you say, ‘The way of the Lord is not just.’ O house of Israel, I will judge each of you according to his ways.”

cnv.text: 你們還說：‘主所行的不公平。’以色列家啊！我必照著你們各人所行的審判你們。”

ccb.text: 可是你们却说，主这样做不公平。以色列人啊，我必按你们各人的行为审判你们。”
